paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, representing an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 21 sessions, the price has decreased by 25.86 percent. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026. Additionally, there have been recent social media posts, including one mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and another discussing a trade at 6.80.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026, and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include an 8-K form regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
